title: Proofpack Manifest
description: A machine-readable manifest for a proofpack or evidence bundle.

runId.description: Identifier of the orchestration run this proofpack represents.

planId.description: Identifier of the plan associated with this proofpack.

receipts.description: List of receipt IDs included in the proofpack.

trustDecisions.description: List of trust decision IDs included in the proofpack.

attestations.description: List of attestation record IDs included in the proofpack.

createdAt.description: The time the proofpack was created.

manifestHash.description: Deterministic hash of the proofpack content.

redacted.description: Whether the proofpack has been redacted of sensitive information.
